ANT 104 - INTRO TO BIO ANTHRO
Home Genetic Diet Social Bonds Conclusion Citations
References

Citations & References

Works Cited

Axelsson, E., et al. "The Genomic Signature of Dog Domestication Reveals Adaptation to a Starch-Rich Diet." Nature, vol. 495, 2013, pp. 360–364. https://doi.org/10.1038/nature11837.

Bergström, Anders, et al. "Origins and Genetic Legacy of Prehistoric Dogs." Science, vol. 370, no. 6516, 2020, pp. 557-564. https://doi.org/10.1126/science.aba9572.

Freedman, A. H., et al. "Genome Sequencing Highlights the Dynamic Early History of Dogs." PLOS Genetics, vol. 10, no. 1, 2014, p. e1004016. https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pgen.1004016.

Janssens, Luc, et al. "A New Look at an Old Dog: Bonn-Oberkassel Reconsidered." Journal of Archaeological Science, vol. 92, 2018, pp. 126-138. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jas.2018.01.004.

Larson, G., and D. G. Bradley. "How Much Is That in Dog Years? The Advent of Canine Population Genomics." PLOS Genetics, vol. 10, no. 1, 2014, p. e1004093. https://doi.org/10.1371/journal.pgen.1004093.

Ollivier, Morgane, et al. "Dogs Accompanied Humans During the Neolithic Expansion into Europe." Biology Letters, vol. 14, no. 10, 2018, p. 20180286. https://doi.org/10.1098/rsbl.2018.0286.

Image Citations

Image 1, Home: "Paleolithic Humans Domesticate Dogs and Spread Them Across Eurasia." ChosunBiz, 26 Mar. 2026, https://biz.chosun.com/en/en-science/2026/03/26/GGMXECAQP5BEVEHXTXXSYTOYIQ/.

Image 2, Genetic Diet: Figure 4 from Bergström, Anders, et al. "Origins and Genetic Legacy of Prehistoric Dogs." Science, vol. 370, 2020, pp. 557-564. Science, https://www.science.org/doi/10.1126/science.aba9572.

Image 3, Social Bonds: Bonn-Oberkassel Canine Remains Visual Record from Janssens, Luc, et al. "A New Look at an Old Dog: Bonn-Oberkassel Reconsidered." Journal of Archaeological Science, vol. 92, 2018, pp. 126-138. ScienceDirect, https://www.sciencedirect.com/science/article/abs/pii/S0305440318300049?via%3Dihub.

AI Transparency

AI was used alongside my computer science software development major skills for the technical aspect of this project. Kimi.ai was used to assist in the formatting of the initial annotated bibliography and helped with search terms for researching. Step 3.7-flash and eventually Claude Haiku was used as a coding assistant to write the Astro and Tailwind CSS framework, format the MLA citations, and help synthesize and edit the provided academic quotes into the final readable web copy. All core research directions, source selections, and the overarching thesis framework were independently developed by me, Hammy S.
